title: Beautiful FPS
description: Helps Minecraft actually run, and way faster at that!
body:
## Ever wanted 100+ FPS with MAX render distance well you've come to the right place... 😎 > Many modpacks and YouTubers brag about their FPS but also have really **beefy** computers. 🙄 Our mission is to make Minecraft get a stable 60 FPS on **any** system, we have tested it all the way to an early **2012 Macbook Pro**. Minecraft is a game that **anyone** should be able to play, **so we made it possible**! #### But you may ask, "Why should I get this modpack? There are hundreds of others that do exactly the same thing!" Well, I have a few reasons but the decision still will come down to you. > 1. ⚙️ This modpack has **every** feature, from Optifine (*CEM, CTM, grass Sides, connected textures, etc*) so you can move over to fabric and **play with other mods**, with no problem, and if offers a **massive performance boost** compared to Optifine! > 2. 🔧 I will continue to **properly maintain** and update this project so that it is never outdated on the **best mods** out there. > 3. 📖 Many other modpacks don't **research** which combination of mods is best and throw random things together and hope for the best. > 4. Beautiful FPS is *fully compatible* with **most mods!** Meaning it's a great pack to download and build off of so that you can just download the **fun mods**, not have to get all the improvements and fixes working! > 5. 🥇 Beautiful FPS strives to have the **greatest FPS improvement of any other modpacks**, yet still has **amazing features** that improve the general experience of Minecraft. > 6. 📣 It's not just another FPS boosting modpack, this project's purpose is to provide any player with what Minecraft should be, but without breaking the **vanilla feel**. And also still allowing the use of servers. > 7. 💁‍♂️ I will always be **ready to help** anyone if the improvements aren't working as they should or any issues that they have with the modpack. And no kidding, I get **100+ FPS** with max render distance and no settings changed! 👀 Imagine the possibilities! This modpack is not only made for **FPS** but also allows the use of **shaders** and it comes with a few built-in features to improve your **quality of life**. **It is also made to work on servers with no problem.** Enjoy! **Join my discord for updates on this project - https://discord.gg/B6ufR7H5BT** **Subscribe to my YouTube channel - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCV0SJRBYgqeY-PBV9JNy7mQ** **Patreon - patreon.com/user?u=70173085** --- Specs: (Keep in mind I use a mod to check FPS, using the F3 menu is **much** slower)
Specs/FPS Windows: FLAGSHIP 🚀 - Windows PC with Intel Core i7-14th gen, RTX 4070, and 32GB of ram@6000mhz (Overclocked/XMP); Stable 4000+ FPS LOW END 📉 (7 year old used parts) - Windows PC with Intel Core i5-6th gen, GTX 1070, and 32GB of ram@3200mhz (Overclocked/XMP); Stable 1000+ FPS MACOS: ULTRA LOW END 💥 - iMac, late 2009, idek but its garbage 4gb of RAM DDR3, normal settings; 2/5 render distance; 60/45FPS LOW END 📉 - MacBook Pro, early 2012; 5 render/sim dist, normal settings; Stable 90+ FPS LOW MID 📊 - MacBook Air, early 2015, 1.6 GHz Dual-Core Intel i5, 4 GB; 5 render/sim dist, normal settings; Stable 145+ FPS MID TIER 📈 - iMac, 2021, Apple M1, 16 GB; 5 render/sim dist, normal settings; Stable 1000+ FPS
--- For help, or to let me know the FPS you get as well as your specs, email me at: empplayzbusiness@gmail.com ^ (Up to 68+ versions may vary.)
